title: NULL literals refused at many places
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT (value IS NULL) AS is_value_null FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL OR name = 'test';
key_bug_features: NULL literals cause failures in SQL queries
